backend/main.mo: Defines the main actor with extensive persistent state maps, ID generation, and type definitions for diagnostics, study content, users, and sessions.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing implemented features, related files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries of many frontend files for build/reference documentation.
frontend/index.html: Base HTML file that mounts the React app and loads main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Top-level React app handling authentication, guest mode, onboarding, and routing to dashboard or landing page.
frontend/src/components/community/HelpAI: Interactive AI help chat that manages a help session, sends messages, and generates simulated AI replies.
frontend/src/components/community/Troubl: Provides an interactive HVAC troubleshooting chat UI that creates sessions, sends messages, and generates simulated AI diagnostic responses.
frontend/src/components/community/VideoL: Displays a searchable, categorized video library with filters, video cards, and playlist detection.
Interactive flashcard viewer with flipping, navigation, and reset controls.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer with branding and caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/GuestBanner.tsx: Guest-mode banner that explains limitations and provides an upgrade modal trigger.
frontend/src/components/GuestModeCheckli: Renders a guest-access checklist showing available and locked features with an upgrade CTA.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Implements the main app header with branding, theme toggle, user menu, and mobile navigation.
frontend/src/components/OnboardingWalkth: Provides a multi-step onboarding slideshow with icons, descriptions, and navigation controls.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal for collecting and submitting user profile details, including an upgrade flow for guests.
frontend/src/components/QuizViewer.tsx: Displays quiz questions, tracks answers, computes results, and shows detailed score feedback.
frontend/src/components/study/Achievemen: Computes user achievement statuses from progress data and renders achievement cards with progress indicators.
frontend/src/components/study/AnalyticsV: Generates charts and summaries showing module performance, EPA scores, progress trends, and skill strengths.
frontend/src/components/study/CoreLesson: Renders core HVAC lesson cards and enables switching into a lesson viewer, with optional beginner-mode guidance.
frontend/src/components/study/EPA608Cont: Displays EPA 608 study content; filters videos by section and shows tabs with related materials and video links.
frontend/src/components/study/EPA608Exam: Implements a timed EPA 608 exam simulation with randomized questions, navigation, scoring, and optional explanations.
frontend/src/components/study/EPA608Less: Renders a structured lesson module with theory, scenarios, videos, and interactive questions for a selected EPA 608 section.
frontend/src/components/study/EPA608Modu: Top-level module handling certification selection and switching between study, practice, tools, exam simulation, and lessons.
frontend/src/components/study/EPA608Prac: Provides adaptive practice questions with difficulty adjustment, explanations, scoring, and navigation.
frontend/src/components/study/EPA608Read: Displays EPA 608 readiness metrics using mock data, with per-section progress, mastery, and next recommended study topic logic.
frontend/src/components/study/HandsOnExe: Provides interactive HVAC calculation exercises with selectable tasks and dynamic input-based feedback.
frontend/src/components/study/Interactiv: Renders a hub of virtual HVAC tools and loads the selected simulator or calculator component.
frontend/src/components/study/LessonView: Shows lesson content with tabs for theory, diagrams, and formulas, including zoomable images and beginner tips.
frontend/src/components/study/Multimeter: Presents a detailed multimeter training lesson with safety rules, examples, and beginner-focused guidance.
frontend/src/components/study/ProgressDa: Displays learning stats, calculated progress, streaks, module scores, and provides tabbed views with export functionality.
frontend/src/components/study/RecoveryTr: Provides interactive HVAC recovery, pump-down, and vacuum checklists with progress tracking and diagram selection.
frontend/src/components/study/StudySyste: Landing page for the study system offering navigation to lessons, EPA prep, hands‑on modules, and mode‑specific content.
frontend/src/components/study/tools/Airf: Interactive airflow calculator that computes CFM and tonnage, evaluates system performance, and provides diagnostic feedback.
frontend/src/components/study/tools/Digi: Simulates a digital multimeter with selectable modes and components, providing readings, status evaluation, and safety feedback.
Simulates refrigerant pressure readings for different refrigerants and sides, giving status and diagnostic feedback.
Calculates and displays superheat and subcooling based on user‑entered temperatures with status indicators.
frontend/src/components/study/tools/Leak: Simulates an electronic leak detector with adjustable sensitivity, dynamic leak levels, and repair recommendations.
frontend/src/components/study/tools/PPES: Allows selecting PPE for different scenarios and checks correctness against required safety gear.
frontend/src/components/study/tools/Supe: Interactive HVAC calculator computing superheat, subcooling, targets, and diagnostic statuses using simplified PT charts and user inputs.
frontend/src/components/study/tools/Virt: Simulated refrigerant recovery tool modeling pressures, charge recovery, safety checks, and progress based on refrigerant type and mode.
frontend/src/components/study/UEiDL589Mu: Detailed reference guide covering HVAC multimeter functions, safety rules, and usage examples tailored to skill level.
frontend/src/data/epaQuestionBank.ts: Large dataset of EPA 608 exam questions including metadata such as difficulty, explanations, references, and lesson links.
frontend/src/data/refrigerantDatabase.ts: Comprehensive refrigerant specification list with physical properties, safety classes, charging rules, applications, and notes.
frontend/src/data/videoLibrary.ts: Curated library of HVAC training videos with metadata including category, duration, description, and lesson links.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook creating and managing authenticated or anonymous backend actors and refreshing dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing login, identity state, and AuthClient configuration.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and saving user profiles and interacting with backend actors, including validation and fallback initialization.
frontend/src/index.css: Sets up Tailwind base styles and custom CSS variables, dark mode themes, utilities, and UI behavior optimizations.
frontend/src/lib/diagnosticFlows.ts: Defines data structures and preset diagnostic flows for HVAC troubleshooting steps, questions, and measurements.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Initializes the React app, wrapping it with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before rendering.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Implements the main dashboard UI with tabs, lazy‑loaded sections, and guest mode prompts for the HVAC Buddy app.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Landing page providing login and guest access plus marketing sections and feature highlights.
frontend/src/pages/tabs/CalculatorsTab.t: Hosts multiple HVAC field calculators including superheat, subcooling, load, duct sizing, and electrical tools.
frontend/src/pages/tabs/CommunityTab.tsx: Community hub offering AI help, troubleshooting chat, video library access, and knowledge base navigation.
frontend/src/pages/tabs/DataLoggingTab.t: Interface for logging HVAC measurements, exporting logs, and adding entries with guest restrictions enforced.
frontend/src/pages/tabs/JobsTab.tsx: Job management UI allowing creation of work orders with customer details and guest access limitations.
frontend/src/pages/tabs/PartsTab.tsx: Implements an HVAC parts search and filtering UI with mock parts data and QR scanning support.
frontend/src/pages/tabs/PhotoDiagnosticT: Provides image capture or upload and simulates AI-based component analysis with a camera dialog.
frontend/src/pages/tabs/StudyTab.tsx: Controls navigation among study modules based on user profile study mode and selected view.
frontend/src/pages/tabs/SuppliersTab.tsx: Displays preloaded and user-added suppliers with filtering, editing, and creation dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/tabs/TroubleshooterTa: Defines a complex troubleshooting workflow with diagnostic steps, sessions, and adaptive AI assistance.
frontend/src/types/local.ts: Contains frontend-specific type definitions for user profiles, suppliers, videos, study materials, jobs, diagnostics, and chat.
frontend/src/types/study.ts: Defines local StudyMode types and helper constructors mirroring backend semantics.
frontend/src/utils/guestRestrictions.ts: Centralizes guest restriction messaging and simple helper checks for gated actions.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides helpers to read URL parameters (including hash), persist them in sessionStorage, and clear them from storage or the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind with custom colors, container settings, animations, and plugins including typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Defines the project’s state, including study module feature requirements, architectural notes, and versioned metadata.
